summary: Iteration 6 — Frontend-only verification of the Investment-weight Y-axis label fix on /ideation → Channels tab at 1920x1080 with seeded run 7da57a83-626e-47b2-9289-044d2e4fbd6c. ALL 3 review items PASS: (1) Strategy page loads, [data-testid='strategy-studio'] visible, all 6 tabs (overview/icp/messaging/channels/roadmap/metrics) visible. (2) Channels tab renders the vertical-layout BarChart inside div.h-72 with 6 channels. Inspected the raw SVG: the YAxis emits exactly 6 <g><title/><text/></g> ticks (the new YTick component). Every <text> has textAnchor='end', NO rotation transform (text.transform='none', g.transform='translate(224, …)'), exactly 0 tspans (no character-by-character stacking), and is positioned at x=-8 — i.e. horizontally to the LEFT of the bars. (3) Truncation: 5 of the 6 channel names exceed 28 chars and are rendered ending with '…' (e.g. 'Technical content + docs + …', 'Frontier Program field work…', 'Gartner/Analyst relations +…', 'Partner ecosystem (GSIs/SIs…', 'Developer events/webinars/w…'); the SVG <title> child of each tick contains the FULL channel name ('Technical content + docs + SDKs', 'Frontier Program field workshops', 'Gartner/Analyst relations + citations', 'Partner ecosystem (GSIs/SIs/ISVs)', 'Developer events/webinars/workshops') for native browser hover tooltip. The short label 'Executive ABM (1:1/1:few)' (25 chars) renders un-truncated as expected. Visual screenshot confirms each bar aligns with one single-line label and there is NO vertical / stacked / character-by-character text anywhere on the Y-axis.
verified_passing: Strategy page (/ideation) loads with no React render errors / no pageerrors
Channels tab (data-testid='tab-channels') click switches view and renders div.h-72 InvestmentChart vertical-layout BarChart
All 6 Y-axis ticks rendered by custom YTick: single <text textAnchor='end'> per row, no rotation, no tspans (single line, horizontal)
Each tick g is translated to ~x=224 (i.e. inside the 220-wide YAxis column) and the <text> sits at x=-8, LEFT of the bars which start at x≈285
Bars: 6 horizontal bars (barCount=12 counts both rectangle layers — i.e. 6 bars × 2 rect elements per recharts bar)
Truncation: 5/6 labels end with '…' (>28 chars); each has a <title> child with the full untruncated channel name for native SVG hover tooltip
Short label 'Executive ABM (1:1/1:few)' (25 chars) is NOT truncated — threshold logic correct
minor_console_warnings: Recharts emits two transient warnings 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' during the very first paint of the Overview tab's h-56 chart (before ResponsiveContainer measures). They disappear after first layout and do not affect rendering or the Channels chart. Not introduced by this fix.
critical_code_review_comments: StrategyStudio.jsx YTick implementation is correct: <g transform=translate(x,y)><title>{raw}</title><text x=-8 dy=4 textAnchor='end' fontSize=12>{truncated}</text></g> guarantees a single-line SVG text node with end-anchor (right-aligned to bar start) and a native SVG <title> tooltip — exactly what was needed to replace recharts' default multi-tspan word-wrap.

YAxis props are well chosen: width=220 (gives the labels their own column), interval=0 (force every category label), tickLine=false + axisLine=false (clean look), and tick={<YTick />} (delegates rendering). Combined with the chart container being h-72 (~288px) for 6 bars at barSize=20, vertical spacing is comfortable (~40px between labels), no overlap.

Truncation threshold of 28 chars at fontSize=12 + width=220 leaves ~10–15px right padding before the bars — visually verified on 5 truncated labels. If channel names ever grow past ~35 chars the ellipsis still keeps a single line.

Suggestion (NON-BLOCKING): the same YTick could be reused for the Overview tab's horizontal-layout chart for symmetry, but the X-axis there already uses angle=-12 with textAnchor='end' which works at h-56 height. Not a bug.

NOTE: The two iteration_5 carryover items (PersonaCard role_title citation strip, SwotQuadrant `key` prop destructure warning) live in ResearchVisuals.jsx and are OUT OF SCOPE for this iteration — neither was re-verified.
seed_data_creation: Reused existing seeded run 7da57a83-626e-47b2-9289-044d2e4fbd6c via localStorage.setItem('move:active_run_id', ...). The run already had 6 channelPlays with channel names varying from 25 to 37 chars, so both the truncated and un-truncated code paths were exercised.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Y-axis horizontal-label fix on /ideation → Channels tab is COMPLETE and verified at 1920x1080. The seeded run 7da57a83 exercises both un-truncated (Executive ABM 25 chars) and truncated (5 channels >28 chars with full <title> tooltips) paths. Iteration_5 carryover items (PersonaCard citation strip on role_title/persona_name, SwotQuadrant `key` prop destructure) remain unaddressed and are unrelated to this iteration — re-test those if main agent applies fixes.
